verificationSource: Official Paradise public test-lab status after guarded bot smoke

testGuild.notes: The source compact schema contains 51 template channels. The three additional channels are created by safe test workflows such as the support-ticket smoke, transcript path and temporary review flow.

language.trainingAndTryout: Selected guild language is used; Turkish is the default and the v8 smoke was built from Turkish-default session copy.
language.applicationPanel: Turkish-default application panel was reposted in the live test smoke; English is used only when the selected server language is English.
language.englishFallback: Available only when the selected guild language is English.
